title: Chopper Fights the Poison
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on chopper fights the poison within the The Poison Gas Called Koro storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's chopPae- Mon! From the lower forest!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Was Caesar's weapon really responsible for all of this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah... this country was almost completely wiped out. At the hands of those guys from earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: Looks like Caesar's done a good job of getting rid of the remaining gas, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If they were willing to go this far, I'd say there's still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A good chance a large number of them are still hiding out some- where on this island.

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: According to the Gasbrain, the MINK Races are a violent bunch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If that turns out to be the case...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We might end up regretting saving these guys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll blow all of you to smith- greens!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WHAT GRUDGE DO YOU HOLD AGAINST US?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What do you possibly hope to gain by slaughtering our people?

summary: Chopper Fights the Poison: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
